abilities.description: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token with defender.
You may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, destroy target artifact or creature.
Choose target artifact card in a graveyard or artifact on the battlefield. Create three tokens that are copies of it.

effect.description: Choose target artifact card in a graveyard or artifact on the battlefield. Create three tokens that are copies of it.
effect.name: CopyPermanent

abilities.target_prompt: Select target artifact card in a graveyard or artifact on the battlefield
